io.k8s.api.apps.v1.Deployment.description: Deployment enables declarative updates for Pods and ReplicaSets.

apiVersion.description: APIVersion defines the versioned schema of this representation of an object.

kind.description: Kind is a string value representing the REST resource this object represents.

spec.description: Specification of the desired behavior of the Deployment.

status.description: Most recently observed status of the Deployment.

io.k8s.api.apps.v1.DeploymentSpec.description: DeploymentSpec is the specification of the desired behavior of the Deployment.

template.description: Template describes the pods that will be created.

strategy.description: The deployment strategy to use to replace existing pods with new ones.

minReadySeconds.description: Minimum number of seconds for which a newly created pod should be ready.

io.k8s.api.apps.v1.DeploymentStatus.description: DeploymentStatus is the most recently observed status of the Deployment.

conditions.description: Represents the latest available observations of a deployment's current state.

io.k8s.api.apps.v1.DeploymentCondition.description: DeploymentCondition describes the state of a deployment at a certain point.

status.description: Status of the condition, one of True, False, Unknown.

reason.description: The reason for the condition's last transition.

message.description: A human readable message indicating details about the transition.

io.k8s.api.apps.v1.DeploymentStrategy.description: DeploymentStrategy describes how to replace existing pods with new ones.

io.k8s.apimachinery.pkg.apis.meta.v1.Obj.description: ObjectMeta is metadata that all persisted resources must have.

name.description: Name must be unique within a namespace.

namespace.description: Namespace defines the space within which each name must be unique.

labels.description: Map of string keys and values that can be used to organize and categorize objects.

annotations.description: Annotations is an unstructured key value map stored with a resource.

ownerReferences.description: List of objects depended by this object.

io.k8s.apimachinery.pkg.apis.meta.v1.Own.description: OwnerReference contains enough information to let you identify an owning object.

io.k8s.apimachinery.pkg.apis.meta.v1.Lab.description: A label selector is a label query over a set of resources.

matchLabels.description: matchLabels is a map of key-value pairs.

matchExpressions.description: matchExpressions is a list of label selector requirements.

io.k8s.apimachinery.pkg.apis.meta.v1.Lab.description: A label selector requirement is a selector that contains values, a key, and an operator.

key.description: key is the label key that the selector applies to.

operator.description: operator represents a key's relationship to a set of values.

values.description: values is an array of string values.

io.k8s.api.core.v1.PodTemplateSpec.description: PodTemplateSpec describes the data a pod should have when created from a template.

spec.description: Specification of the desired behavior of the pod.

io.k8s.api.core.v1.PodSpec.description: PodSpec is a description of a pod.

containers.description: List of containers belonging to the pod.

restartPolicy.description: Restart policy for all containers within the pod.

serviceAccountName.description: ServiceAccountName is the name of the ServiceAccount to use to run this pod.

volumes.description: List of volumes that can be mounted by containers belonging to the pod.

io.k8s.api.core.v1.Container.description: A single application container that you want to run within a pod.

ports.description: List of ports to expose from the container.

resources.description: Compute Resources required by this container.

io.k8s.api.core.v1.ContainerPort.description: ContainerPort represents a network port in a single container.

containerPort.description: Number of port to expose on the pod's IP address.

io.k8s.api.core.v1.Volume.description: Volume represents a named volume in a pod that may be accessed by any container in the pod.

configMap.description: configMap represents a configMap that should populate this volume.

io.k8s.api.core.v1.ConfigMapVolumeSource.description: Adapts a ConfigMap into a volume.

optional.description: optional specify whether the ConfigMap or its keys must be defined.

io.k8s.api.core.v1.ResourceRequirements.description: ResourceRequirements describes the compute resource requirements.

limits.description: Limits describes the maximum amount of compute resources allowed.

requests.description: Requests describes the minimum amount of compute resources required.

io.k8s.apimachinery.pkg.api.resource.Qua.description: Quantity is a fixed-point representation of a number. It provides convenient marshaling/unmarshaling in JSON and YAML.

io.k8s.apimachinery.pkg.util.intstr.IntO.description: IntOrString is a type that can hold an int32 or a string.

io.k8s.apiextensions-apiserver.pkg.apis..description: JSONSchemaProps is a JSON-Schema following Spec Draft 4.

format.description: format is an OpenAPI v3 format string.

properties.description: properties is a map of property names to JSONSchemaProps.

items.description: items is the schema for list items.

required.description: required is a list of required property names.

enum.description: enum is a list of allowed values.

x-kubernetes-preserve-unknown-fields.description: x-kubernetes-preserve-unknown-fields stops the API server decoding step from pruning fields.

x-kubernetes-int-or-string.description: x-kubernetes-int-or-string specifies that this value is either an integer or a string.

x-kubernetes-embedded-resource.description: x-kubernetes-embedded-resource defines that the value is an embedded Kubernetes runtime.Object.

io.k8s.apiextensions-apiserver.pkg.apis..description: JSONSchemaPropsOrArray represents a value that can either be a JSONSchemaProps or an array of JSONSchemaProps.
JSON represents any valid JSON value.

io.k8s.api.core.v1.ServicePort.description: ServicePort contains information on service's port.

port.description: The port that will be exposed by this service.

targetPort.description: Number or name of the port to access on the pods targeted by the service.

protocol.description: The IP protocol for this port.

io.k8s.api.core.v1.Probe.description: Probe describes a health check to be performed against a container.

initialDelaySeconds.description: Number of seconds after the container has started before liveness probes are initiated.

periodSeconds.description: How often (in seconds) to perform the probe.

timeoutSeconds.description: Number of seconds after which the probe times out.

io.k8s.api.core.v1.TypeWithIntOrString.description: A test type that uses x-kubernetes-int-or-string.

io.k8s.api.core.v1.TypeWithPreserveUnkno.description: A test type that uses x-kubernetes-preserve-unknown-fields.

io.k8s.api.core.v1.TypeWithEmbeddedResou.description: A test type that uses x-kubernetes-embedded-resource.

io.k8s.api.core.v1.AllOfCompositeType.description: AllOfCompositeType demonstrates allOf composition by combining multiple schemas.

customField.description: A custom field added via allOf composition.

io.k8s.api.core.v1.OneOfUnionType.description: OneOfUnionType demonstrates oneOf union type handling.

handler.description: Handler defines a specific action that should be taken.

io.k8s.api.networking.v1.NetworkPolicy.description: NetworkPolicy describes what network traffic is allowed for a set of Pods.

kind.description: Kind is a string value representing the REST resource.

spec.description: Specification of the desired behavior for this NetworkPolicy.

io.k8s.api.networking.v1.NetworkPolicySp.description: NetworkPolicySpec provides the specification of a NetworkPolicy.

podSelector.description: Selects the pods to which this NetworkPolicy object applies.

policyTypes.description: List of rule types that the NetworkPolicy relates to.
